title: Whatsaround.app
description: Developed backend APIs supporting booking management and transactional workflows.Designed PostgreSQL database schemas and optimized queries for performance.Contributed to a scalable production application handling real-world usage.

title: NeighborHub
description: A full-stack web application for managing residential community services, offering booking, payment, and verification features. Built with React and Node.js, it ensures a seamless and scalable user experience.

title: Epass Management for Temples
description: A full-stack temple management platform that digitizes darshan passes, pooja bookings, food services, and accommodation. It features QR-based entry validation, eco-fee handling, and real-time slot management. Designed to streamline crowd control while enhancing the devotee experience.

title: Adaptive Learning Interface for Multimodal Educational Resources
description: Developed a web-based learning system analyzing PDFs, videos, images, and text.Applied Deep Learning models including CNNs, RNNs, and NLP techniques.Implemented adaptive assessments and personalized recommendation engine.
